notes: A big batch of card bugs from live playtesting is fixed, plus board/UI polish. Card fixes: Sentomaru no longer instantly loses you the game when its effect searches your deck (this was hitting every 'search your deck' card); Roronoa Zoro leader (OP12-020) now correctly re-stands after battling a Character and its drawback no longer gets misapplied to your opponent's card; Trafalgar Law (ST17-002) resolves its second return with a Seven Warlords leader; Luffy & Ace leader (ST30-001) no longer keeps a permanent +3000 (the buff is limited to your opponent's turn); Crocodile (ST17-001) now draws 2 and places a card after revealing a Warlord; Marshall.D.Teach (ST17-005) can place a card on top of your deck; Roronoa Zoro (OP07-034) auto-gains +2000 on attack instead of making you select it; Power Mochi now grants +2000 not +4000; and Doflamingo's 'you may play' the revealed card is now genuinely optional. Board & UI: player names now show everywhere (pills, turn banner, match history) instead of 'South/North'; status tags on your opponent's cards read right-side-up; the card preview drops a redundant name; the 'Show Result' button no longer sits on the opponent's hand; 'Ready — waiting for opponent' is readable; black decks look black; and the updater's 'What's New' now shows what actually changed.
